personalInfo.name: Murillo Frazão Cunha
personalInfo.title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: I am a Backend Developer with experience in building scalable applications, high-performance systems, and Linux infrastructure. I work primarily with Java, Kotlin, and Node.js, developing modern solutions focused on performance, automation, and scalability.

I have experience creating robust APIs, designing distributed system architectures, and managing infrastructure using technologies like Docker, PostgreSQL, Redis, and MongoDB to build efficient and resilient applications.

I also work on developing infrastructure panels and container management systems, including daemons responsible for communication and process execution on Linux servers, applying concepts of monitoring, automation, and real-time communication.
I have a strong interest in software architecture, performance optimization, and developing custom tools aimed at productivity and backend application organization.

I hold a technical degree in Electrotechnics from SENAI and am currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science at FSA, combining hardware and software knowledge to create scalable, modern, and efficient solutions.

resume.summary: Full-Stack Developer focused on distributed environments, scalable systems, and Linux infrastructure. Solid practical experience with Java, Node.js, and Go, combining the creation of robust backend tools and automation with the development of modern interfaces.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Chronological tracking of my technical evolution. From developing plugins at age 12 to architecting distributed systems and modern frameworks.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.description: Technologies, tools, and areas where I have practical experience in developing applications, infrastructure, and backend systems.

experienceData.description: Nytlex.js is a high-performance full-stack framework focused on runtime optimization and delivering scalable applications, featuring HTTP/3 support and integration with Go services for asset and infrastructure optimization.

Lunar Panel is a Docker container management platform for Linux environment automation and game hosting, featuring an execution daemon and administrative panel for provisioning, monitoring, and resource management.

High-performance backend development in Java and Kotlin for high-concurrency systems, focusing on scalability, optimization, and stability. Experience with MySQL, Redis, and Linux infrastructure, applying architecture geared towards high-demand environments.

Development of a smart passenger monitoring system for public transport, using Arduino Mega, ultrasonic sensors, and ESP8266 for data collection and transmission via Wi-Fi, with a React web interface for real-time monitoring and visualization.

educationData.description: Focus on computing fundamentals, systems architecture, backend, distributed systems, and framework development.
Study of electronics, automation, digital logic, networks, and practical integration between hardware and software.

certificationsData.description: Concepts of Traditional and Generative AI, impacts on research, productivity, and ethical guidelines.
Analysis of Web history and exploration of emerging technologies applied to Web 3.0.
Enabling technologies: Big Data, IoT, Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, and Digital Security.
Principles of environmental, social, and corporate governance aimed at corporate sustainability.
Structuring own businesses, evaluating technical feasibility, market, and legal aspects.
Evolution of mobile networks, basic infrastructure, and advanced applications of 5G technology.
Circular production models, smart consumption, and transition integrating Industry 4.0.
Prevention of occupational risks, PPE/CPE guidelines, CIPA standards, and risk maps.
Digital privacy under LGPD, data subjects' rights, governance, and legal compliance.

skills.name: WebStorm
skills.description: Modern applications in JavaScript and TypeScript

projects.title: Nytlex.js - Framework
projects.description: Modern, full-stack web framework for Node.js, developed with native, first-class support for React, Vue, and Svelte. The project introduces native out-of-the-box HTTP/3 support, utilizing an HTTP server written in Go with integrated SSL termination, allowing applications to run directly on the web's latest transport protocol without relying on external proxies or layers. It also features an integrated routing system, authentication, APIs, and optimized rendering for modern applications.

projects.title: SmartBus - Intelligent Passenger Monitoring
projects.description: Development of a smart passenger monitoring system for public transportation using embedded hardware and real-time communication. The project consisted of a functional bus prototype with automated detection of people entering and exiting via ultrasonic sensors connected to an Arduino Mega, with data transmission via ESP8266 using a Wi-Fi network. A React web interface was also developed for real-time monitoring of passenger count, metrics visualization, and hardware-software integration.

projects.title: Lunar Panel - Management
projects.description: Development of a modern management panel for servers and Docker containers, inspired by large-scale infrastructure platforms. The frontend was developed in React, while the backend was written in PHP, offering real-time management of instances, users, resources, and administrative operations focusing on performance, usability, and automation.

projects.title: Lunar Plume - Daemon
projects.description: Development of Lunar Plume, a daemon responsible for direct communication between the panel and Docker servers. Written in Go, the system manages container creation, resource monitoring, command execution, and real-time operations, utilizing concurrency and efficient communication to ensure high performance, stability, and low latency.

projects.title: Hight MC - Minecraft
projects.description: Acted as one of the leads in the development and management of Hight, a large-scale multiplayer Minecraft server. I was responsible for the architecture and implementation of several advanced systems in Java and Kotlin, working directly on performance, scalability, and stability to support thousands of simultaneous players. I also participated in the integration of distributed services, infrastructure optimization, and development of connected solutions with Redis, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.

projects.title: Hight - Forum
projects.description: Complete development of the official Hight forum using Next.js, React, and TypeScript. The system featured direct integration with the Minecraft server, custom authentication, a multi-language system, and a modern interface aimed at community building, player interaction, and an optimized browsing experience.

projects.title: Hight - Store
projects.description: Development of the official Hight store during the platform's internationalization process. The system was built with a focus on automation, performance, and user experience, featuring direct integration to the server, payments via Stripe and cryptocurrencies, automatic digital product delivery, and a modern, fully responsive interface.
